RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court ruled on Cross-DEFENDANT DELTAK CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC.'S (SUED AS ROE 1) Motion For Continuance Of Trial, Or In The Alternative, Severing The Cross-Complaint -- Motion to sever was denied. Motion to continue trial was taken off calendar, to be renoticed in Dept. 206. Prevailing party is to prepare an order complying with CRC 391(a). (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
